task_description: Rebuild calendar event positioning for perfect multi-hour spanning, update time text on drag-drop, smart fetch scoping, fix dashboard blank page, transform AI Chat into detachable sliding panel, and make Spotify button vertical-only draggable.

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. npm run lint has no errors. npm run test has 1 pre-existing failure (react-markdown module in jest env, unrelated to changes). All 6 sprint items implemented: calendar multi-hour event spanning, drag-drop time text update, dashboard blank fix, smart fetch scoping, AI chat detachable panel, Spotify vertical-only drag.
